creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
I like having a default vimrc that works now.

I dislike that the default vimrc that we've installed defaults to Linux style indenting rules.

About the only thing I'd request from this bikeshed is to have a default vimrc that defaults to some semblance of the style(9) rules, rather than the linux indenting rules.

It's annoying because the .vimrc only overrides ${PREFIX}/etc/vimrc, so now I do have to go and update my rules to:

* disable mouse pointer stuff, as cut/paste in the terminal window no longer works for me;
* figure out how to get the indenting rules to be explicitly BSD style, rather than default to "last tab position".
